title: Geothermal Field: Even Well Siting by Star Discrepancy
strategies: diagonal baseline: N wells evenly along the field diagonal (reproduces the checker baseline)
Halton (2,3) low-discrepancy sequence: reliable sub-1/sqrt(N) discrepancy for any N
golden-ratio Kronecker lattice: x = frac(k*phi), y = (k+0.5)/N -- lowest discrepancy of the ladder
invalid: place a well outside the field (containment violation) -> scores 0
